title: Bread Dough Additions and Non-Wheat Flours
content:
ADDITIONS TO DOUGH ("Improvers")

Raisins, dates, dried fruits, citron, nuts, sesame/sunflower seeds, sautéed onions, herbs, bean/grain sprouts, toasted wheat germ, milk solids, brewer's yeast. Maximum ¼ weight of flour. Dust fruits with flour to prevent clumping. Develop gluten with first flour addition before adding improvers.

Non-Wheat Flours:
- Buckwheat, barley, cornmeal, millet, rice, cooked cereal: Use wheat/gluten flour for at least half total flour
- Carob, bran, soy: Use wheat/gluten flour for at least ¾ total flour
- Coarse grains (oats, grits): Pulverize in blender; whole/cracked grains should be cooked before adding
